revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) INTRO TIMESTAMP CORRECTION — the Tesla framing failure should be anchored at 00:09 (Jake's actual opening line, which never uses the Tesla-certified-installer framing) rather than framed as an 'abandonment' at 00:23. Add a cherry_pick entry or state_change at 00:09 citing the intro failure directly. (2) COMP CLAIM REMOVAL — remove the assertion in coaching_focus[0].why that 'a sit from a roofing-referred customer counts' toward setter compensation. This is not supported by the schema. Replace with: the roofing bridge preserves Ion revenue and maintains a deferred solar pipeline; the comp case for Jake rests on future solar sits, not the roofing referral itself. (3) SCHEMA REFERENCE CORRECTIONS — (a) Remove coaching_philosophy.empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure from cherry_pick_moments[4]; the data-mining grievance is a trust/privacy concern covered by protocols.how_did_you_get_my_number, not a vulnerability disclosure. (b) Correct cherry_pick_moments[0] schema reference from cross_sell_signals.roof_replacement_planned (wrong category) to verify.interest_in_solar + coaching_philosophy.curiosity_over_features. RECOMMENDED ADDITIONS (not blocking but strengthen the output): Add cherry_pick moments for (a) 03:13 trust-seeding miss, (b) 04:20 enthusiasm-signal-plus-scope-creep-trigger, (c) 10:05 soft-callback-vs-locked-time. Soften 'contempt' to 'resigned frustration' in state_changes[5]. Soften 'manufactured the rejection' in trajectory_verdict.summary. Soften 'not an advanced skill' in cherry_pick_moments[2].coaching_implication.
